name: mcp-server-asgardeo
description: MCP server to interact with your Asgardeo organization through LLM tools.

rating.reason: Tool names are clear and specific, indicating their purpose well. Descriptions are mostly adequate but brief, covering basic functionality without much context about usage or limitations. Parameter documentation is basic but functional - most parameters have clear descriptions of their purpose and type, though some could benefit from more detail about constraints or expected formats. The toolset is broadly usable but leaves users to infer some implementation details.
